settings.title: Classic Floral
settings.description: Soft floral design with elegant typography

settings.question: Can I personalise the backdrop with our names and date?
settings.answer: Yes. All our wedding designs can be personalised with your names, wedding date, and custom messages.

settings.question: What material are wedding backdrops printed on?
settings.answer: Our wedding backdrops are printed on premium PVC banner material for a smooth, professional finish. Fabric options available on request.

settings.question: How do I hang the backdrop?
settings.answer: We can add eyelets, pole pockets, or hem finishing. Most venues use a simple frame or stand which we can advise on.

settings.question: How far in advance should I order?
settings.answer: We recommend ordering at least 2 weeks before your wedding. Rush orders are available for an additional fee.

settings.heading: Create your perfect wedding backdrop
